result.stdout:
Tnzi CLI

Interactive mode:
  - tnzi
  - tnzi repl

Command                                Description                           
tnzi init [--name <name>] [--template  Create a new project or initialize an 
standard|lite] [--modules <m1,m2,...>] existing one                          
[--db <provider>] [--ui                                                      
shadcn|naive-ui|vant|custom|none] [                                          
--output <path>] [--dry-run] [                                               
--non-interactive]                                                           
tnzi add module <name> [--base         Add a business module                 
<entity-base>] [--key <type>] [                                              
--dry-run] [--non-interactive]                                               
tnzi add app <name> [--ui              Add a frontend app to the workspace   
naive-ui|shadcn|vant|custom] [                                               
--dry-run] [--non-interactive]                                               
tnzi install <module> [--dry-run]      Install a Tnzi framework module       
                                       (Identity, Storage, AI, ...)          
tnzi uninstall-module <module> [       Uninstall a Tnzi framework module     
--dry-run]                                                                   
tnzi generate [--input <path>] [--url  Generate frontend contracts from      
<url>] [--out <path>] [--targets       OpenAPI                               
dto,schema,api,metadata,paths] [                                             
--check]                                                                     
tnzi update [--version <ver>] [        Update Tnzi CLI to the latest version 
--prerelease]                                                                
tnzi uninstall [--force]               Uninstall Tnzi CLI from this machine  
tnzi info                              Display project summary               
tnzi doctor                            Environment diagnostics               
tnzi version                           Print CLI version
